base.subject: goplint clean-tree evidence
base.selection_rationale: Latest retained predecessor synthetic commit containing the completed predecessor implementation while preserving every residual behavior under test. Repository HEAD predates that combined predecessor state and is not a valid residual baseline.

probe_overlay.apply_check: git apply --check against base commit passed; git apply --check --reverse against the observed probe tree passed
probe_overlay.scope: Historical counterexample probes only. The overlay is retained evidence and is not part of the active test, mutation, or gate suite.

observations.expected_red: NewElseBranchSuccess must report a missing Validate call on the nil-error else edge.
An unresolved stored closure must remain blocking inconclusive before exception and inline-ignore suppression.
Discarded, overwritten, and mismatched conditional results must not receive unconditional validation credit.
observations.observed_failure: No diagnostics were reported for the discarded, overwritten, and mismatched conditional-result counterexamples.

observations.expected_red: Package-stored and detached function literals must be registered even when not directly executable from init.
observations.observed_failure: No diagnostics were reported for the package-stored and detached literal sites.

observations.expected_red: Pointer channels, aggregate stores, indirect stores, package stores, escaping closures, and recursive helper effects must invalidate proof or become blocking inconclusive.
observations.observed_failure: Expected diagnostics were absent across the mutable post-validation escape matrix.

observations.expected_red: Imported facts with a wrong function, target slot, target role, condition slot, or condition type must be rejected.
observations.observed_failure: All five structurally incompatible fact mutations were accepted as valid.

observations.expected_red: All twelve invalid directive attachment and parameter classes must produce actionable diagnostics.
Stable IDs must survive package-leaf renames and source-layout shifts when semantic identity is unchanged.
observations.observed_failure: Both package-leaf rename and raw source layout changed the finding identity.

observations.expected_red: String markers without executed semantic case records must not receive evidence-layer credit.
observations.observed_failure: marker-only evidence received semantic coverage credit; want rejection

observations.expected_red: A declared guard test that fails for an unrelated assertion must not receive mutation-kill credit.
observations.observed_failure: declared test failure received mutation-kill credit without the intended semantic mismatch

observations.expected_red: Definitions and marker strings must not receive subgate population credit without current-run member observations.
observations.observed_failure: definition and string markers received subgate credit without a current-run execution census

observations.expected_red: Clean-tree materialization must reject a reviewed path list that omits any dirty tracked or untracked path.
observations.observed_failure: clean-tree capture accepted a reviewed path list that omitted a dirty tracked path
